title: Antibody-antigen interface
prompt: Load a structure of an HIV envelope protein in complex with a human broadly-neutralising antibody, and highlight the residues at the interface between them.
rubric: A structure containing both an HIV envelope (gp120/gp41) chain and antibody (Fab/Ig) chains is loaded
Antibody and antigen are visually distinguishable (e.g. coloured differently)
Interface residues (those in contact across the two partners) are highlighted distinctly
The camera is focused on the interface region rather than the whole complex
notes: Open-ended: many PDB entries satisfy this (e.g. 3NGB = gp120 + VRC01). Tests whether the model can pick a real, appropriate complex and reason about an interface. VLM-graded.
